tests.source_program:
define i1 @test(float %0) {
entry:
%1 = fcmp oge float %0, 0.000000e+00
%2 = fneg float %0
%3 = select i1 %1, float %0, float %2
%4 = fcmp oeq float %3, 0.000000e+00
ret i1 %4
}
tests.current_optimized_program:
define i1 @test(float %0) {
entry:
  %1 = fcmp oge float %0, 0.000000e+00
  %2 = fneg float %0
  %3 = select i1 %1, float %0, float %2
  %4 = fcmp oeq float %3, 0.000000e+00
  ret i1 %4
}

issue.title: missed FP fold, (x >= 0) ? x : -x == 0 => x == 0
issue.body:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/NFEKjp
https://godbolt.org/z/7Ef9Kf4s3
```llvm
define i1 @src(float %0) {
entry:
%1 = fcmp oge float %0, 0.000000e+00
%2 = fneg float %0
%3 = select i1 %1, float %0, float %2
%4 = fcmp oeq float %3, 0.000000e+00
ret i1 %4
}

define i1 @tgt(float %0) {
entry:
%oeq = fcmp oeq float %0, 0.000000e+00
ret i1 %oeq
}
```
@jayfoad @regehr
issue.author: zhengyang92

comments.author: SahilPatidar
comments.body: @dtcxzyw, I'd be happy to take a look at this issue.

comments.author: SahilPatidar
comments.body: @dtcxzyw, Does this whole expression need to be folded, or has some work already been done on it?

comments.author: jayfoad
comments.body: I think this generalizes to `cond ? x : -x == 0 => x == 0` for any condition `cond`.

tests.test_body:
define <8 x i1> @fcmp_one_sel_x_negx_vec(<8 x float> %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fcmp_one_sel_x_negx_vec(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = fcmp one <8 x float> [[X:%.*]], zeroinitializer
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <8 x i1> [[RES]]
  %f = fcmp one <8 x float> %x, zeroinitializer
  %neg = fneg <8 x float> %x
  %sel = select <8 x i1> %f, <8 x float> %x, <8 x float> %neg
  %res = fcmp one <8 x float> %sel, zeroinitializer
  ret <8 x i1> %res
}
